title: Portal - still alive song
description: Adds the song Still alive, and I want you gone from the game portal 1 and portal 2 into minecraft as a datapack. No resource pack needed!
body:
This is the song Still Alive from portal 1.This datapack adds /function still_alive:play ,
/function still_alive:pause , and /function still_alive:stop.If you download the 2.0, you will also have /function I_want_you_gone:play, pause and stop. You DO NOT need a resourcepack for it to work.

I will:
- add more songs from the portal games

You can find the original song on [Youtube (this is not my channel)](https://youtu.be/Y6ljFaKRTrI) 


  
I DO NOT OWN THE ORIGINAL SONG.The original is owned by Valve (they made portal /portal 2 / hl2 (half life 2) /hl 1 (half life 1).
